nasb.text: Pilate answered them, saying, “Do you want me to release for you the King of the Jews?”

esv.text: And he answered them, saying, “Do you want me to release for you the King of the Jews?”

cnv.text: 彼拉多回答他們：“你們要我給你們釋放這個猶太人的王嗎？”

ccb.text: 彼拉多问：“你们要我为你们释放犹太人的王吗？”

csbs.text: 彼拉多问他们，说：“你们要我给你们释放这犹太人的王吗？”
